The Future of Secure
Online Privacy With DPN

Available on iOS and Android devices.

Android

Chrome Extension

Coming Soon

Fully Decentralized Architecture

DPN eliminates centralized servers, leveraging blockchain technology and peer-to-peer networking to provide unparalleled privacy and eliminate single points of failure.

Advanced Encryption and Security

Utilizing AES-256 encryption, Perfect Forward Secrecy (PFS), and multi-hop routing, DPN ensures robust protection for your data, safeguarding it from interception or unauthorized access.

3 Simple Steps

How to Use Decentralized
Private Network

Step 1

Download the DPN App

Install the app from the iOS App Store or Google Play Store on your device.

Step 2

Sign In Using Google

Log in quickly and securely using your Google account.

Step 3

Choose Your Country and Connect

Select your preferred country for connection, then press the rocket icon to start browsing securely.

+200K

Secure Connections Established

7+

Countries Supported

99.9%

Uptime Reliability

Roadmap

Our Roadmap

Phase 1: Foundation and Launch

  • Launch DPN mobile apps on iOS and Android.
  • Establish a secure and decentralized node network.
  • Introduce core VPN functionalities with advanced encryption.

Phase 2: Expansion and Optimization

  • Integrate multi-hop VPN for enhanced privacy.
  • Expand node infrastructure to 100+ countries.
  • Optimize connection speeds and reduce latency.

Phase 3: Governance and Community

  • Deploy Decentralized Autonomous Organization (DAO) for governance.
  • Launch community-driven bug bounty and development programs.
  • Introduce customizable privacy settings for users.

Phase 4: Future Enhancements

  • Implement AI-powered threat detection and response.
  • Research and integrate quantum-resistant encryption.
  • Roll out premium features, including advanced analytics and usage insights.

Secure Your Privacy Today
Stay Protected, Stay Anonymous.

Take control of your online presence with DPN, the world's first fully decentralized VPN. Safeguard your data, shield your identity, and enjoy unrestricted internet access with innovative security and privacy features. Your online freedom starts here.

Coming Soon

At Decentralized Private Network (DPN), we deliver the world's first fully decentralized VPN. Leveraging blockchain and peer-to-peer networking, we empower users with unparalleled online privacy, security, and freedom.
